microsoft_ft: Built a **growth system** from scratch — scaled Azure's recovery validation from a 2-person operation into a platformized, self-service infrastructure sustaining 45+ annual drills and driving **$14M+ business impact** across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that **reduced operational toil by 30%** and turned one-off manual executions into a compounding, repeatable loop.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability — shipped a rack-level drill program in **4 months** with a 94% recovery rate, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation loop that sharpened every quarter.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract — defining the signal layer and success metrics from scratch.

Scaled team leverage through **AI agents**, building an internal planning automation tool and restructuring workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21% without adding headcount.

Turned ambiguous funnel signals into a prioritized quarterly roadmap — translated 40+ stakeholder inputs across engineering, ops, and partner teams into the **three problems worth solving**, shipping fixes that moved retention and expansion metrics.

Embedded AI into the product loop by piloting LLM-powered drill-planning workflows, reducing analyst toil and demonstrating how **agent-first infrastructure** accelerates GTM execution — a model now adopted across two adjacent Azure teams.
microsoft_2023: Drove **activation and adoption** for AI-driven code-generation workflows — ran user demos and onboarding sessions across 14 Azure teams, converting cold users to active ones and saving **37 engineering hours monthly** in sustained lift.

Defined the product roadmap for intent-based YAML generation by running 11+ discovery interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical activation gaps and translating ambiguous user signals into **shippable feature specs**.

Improved the signal layer for documentation retrieval — enforced metadata standards and migrated to an AI-powered semantic search tool, **cutting lookup time by 83%** and making usage data trustworthy enough to run experiments on top of it.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework — driving buy-in across 140+ teams and turning a fragmented funnel into a compounding system.

Defined the problem before shipping the fix — ran discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, then built a roadmap targeting the highest-leverage automation paths to close conversion and expansion gaps.

Built a Power BI signal layer tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership a **trustworthy dashboard** to target automation gaps and prioritize the experiments most likely to move velocity metrics.
amazon_robotics: Owned end-to-end activation for a **2,000+ unit OS migration** — defined the transition strategy, mapped dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and achieved zero operational downtime by shipping in sequenced production iterations rather than planning in isolation.

Ran Agile ceremonies and owned backlog prioritization, resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake loop — converting a reactive support queue into a predictable, self-improving execution system.

Drove cross-functional alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and creating a compounding loop that cut release friction each sprint.
pro_painters: Owned the **full revenue funnel** — acquisition through conversion — managing 200+ monthly proposals via a new CRM process that increased job bookings by 26% and cut time-to-close by standardizing the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversion 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — optimizing the website and Google profile to improve top-of-funnel activation and turn traffic into booked revenue.

Improved pricing model accuracy and sealed margin leaks by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records — turning messy historical data into a trustworthy signal layer leadership could act on each quarter.

tailoring_notes: 'Growth system' (JD: 'You'll build it') woven into microsoft_ft bullet#1 and pro_painters bullet#1 — framing Cyrus as someone who builds the system, not just runs campaigns.

'Signal layer' (JD: 'Define what we measure and how. If a metric isn't trustworthy, you fix it') used substantively in microsoft_ft bullet#4, microsoft_2022 bullet#3, and pro_painters bullet#3 — each grounded in a real data/metrics action.

'Compounding loops' and 'one-off wins into systems' (JD core framing) embedded in microsoft_ft bullet#3 ('loop that sharpened every quarter'), microsoft_2022 bullet#1 ('compounding system'), and amazon_robotics bullet#2 ('self-improving execution system').
'Activation' (JD: owned a funnel, activation metric) surfaced in microsoft_2023 bullet#1 with explicit lift metric and in amazon_robotics bullet#1 framed as activation ownership.

'Agent-first' and 'AI in the product loop' (JD: 'Bring agents and AI into how the product is built') directly mirrored in microsoft_ft bullet#7 with the agent-first infrastructure framing tied to GTM velocity.
